name: [PDF] Bulk Volume Trade Classification and Informed Trading*
snippet: We document that the existing evidence that bulk volume trade classification (BVC) can measure informed trading arises largely due to misspecified tests.

name: [PDF] Bulk volume classification and information detection - Tom Shohfi
